title: cyllenium spruneri
intro: Cyllenium spruneri, also known as Spruneri's bugle, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). It is native to the Mediterranean region and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. Traditionally, Cyllenium spruneri is prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and its leaves and flowers can also be used to make tinctures and salves for topical application.
